title: EA Sports FC 27: New Features and Platforms
description: EA Sports FC 27 is generating significant interest, with the game set to release on Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch, featuring Kylian Mbappé on the cover of the Ultimate Edition.

sources.title: EA Sports FC 27 coming to Nintendo Switch 2, Switch
Kylian Mbappé is the EA Sports FC 27 Ultimate Edition cover athlete, marking his return to the cover after four years
FC 27 Reveal Trailer: The Grounds, Gameplay Changes & Career Mode Detailed

sections.heading: Platform Availability
paragraphs: According to Nintendo Everything, EA Sports FC 27 is confirmed to be coming to both Nintendo Switch 2 and the standard Nintendo Switch.

sections.heading: Cover Athlete
paragraphs: Video Games Chronicle reports that Kylian Mbappé is the cover athlete for the EA Sports FC 27 Ultimate Edition, marking his return to the cover after a four-year absence.

sections.heading: Gameplay and Features
paragraphs: RealSport101 details that the FC 27 reveal trailer spotlights new open-world mode 'The Grounds' and other key features, indicating significant gameplay changes and enhancements in the upcoming release.

faq.q: Which platforms will EA Sports FC 27 be available on?
faq.a: EA Sports FC 27 is coming to Nintendo Switch 2 and the standard Nintendo Switch, as reported by Nintendo Everything.

faq.q: Who is the cover athlete for EA Sports FC 27 Ultimate Edition?
faq.a: Kylian Mbappé is the cover athlete for the EA Sports FC 27 Ultimate Edition, as mentioned by Video Games Chronicle.

faq.q: What new features are included in EA Sports FC 27?
faq.a: The reveal trailer for FC 27 highlights a new open-world mode called 'The Grounds' and other key features, indicating a focus on gameplay changes and enhancements, according to RealSport101.
